description: Appointments module with full CRUD, conflict detection and status lifecycle for Medicano platform

context.dependencies: Sprint 02 must be complete — RolesGuard and @Roles() already exist
context.conflict_detection: Two appointments conflict when: same professionalId, status not CANCELLED, startAt < otherEndAt AND endAt > otherStartAt

prompts.name: appointment-schema
prompts.description: Create the Mongoose Appointment schema with status enum, transitions map and conflict index

prompts.name: appointment-dtos
prompts.description: Create the four DTOs for creating, updating, filtering and changing appointment status
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing class or field. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

AppointmentStatus enum is at apps/api/src/appointments/schemas/appointment.schema.ts — import from there. Do NOT recreate it.
All DTO fields must be readonly.

Create apps/api/src/appointments/dto/create-appointment.dto.ts if it does not already exist:
- clinicId: string — @IsMongoId()
- professionalId: string — @IsMongoId()
- patientId: string — @IsMongoId()
- startAt: string — @IsDateString()
- durationMinutes: number — @IsInt() @Min(15) @Max(480)
- notes?: string — @IsString() @IsOptional()

Create apps/api/src/appointments/dto/update-appointment.dto.ts if it does not already exist:
- startAt?: string — @IsDateString() @IsOptional()
- durationMinutes?: number — @IsInt() @Min(15) @Max(480) @IsOptional()
- notes?: string — @IsString() @IsOptional()

Create apps/api/src/appointments/dto/update-appointment-status.dto.ts if it does not already exist:
- status: AppointmentStatus — @IsEnum(AppointmentStatus)

Create apps/api/src/appointments/dto/get-appointments-query.dto.ts if it does not already exist:
- clinicId?: string — @IsMongoId() @IsOptional()
- professionalId?: string — @IsMongoId() @IsOptional()
- patientId?: string — @IsMongoId() @IsOptional()
- date?: string — @IsDateString() @IsOptional() — used to filter appointments that start on that calendar day
- status?: AppointmentStatus — @IsEnum(AppointmentStatus) @IsOptional()

Import validators from 'class-validator'. If any file already exists with the correct content, make no changes.

prompts.name: appointments-service
prompts.description: Create AppointmentsService with conflict detection and status transition validation
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read apps/api/src/appointments/appointments.service.ts if it exists and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing method or import. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Import from the correct canonical paths — do NOT recreate any of these:
- Appointment, AppointmentDocument, AppointmentSchema, AppointmentStatus, VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS from './schemas/appointment.schema'
- CreateAppointmentDto from './dto/create-appointment.dto'
- UpdateAppointmentDto from './dto/update-appointment.dto'
- UpdateAppointmentStatusDto from './dto/update-appointment-status.dto'
- GetAppointmentsQueryDto from './dto/get-appointments-query.dto'

Create apps/api/src/appointments/appointments.service.ts:

@Injectable() class AppointmentsService:
- constructor injects @InjectModel(Appointment.name) private readonly appointmentModel: Model<AppointmentDocument>

async create(dto: CreateAppointmentDto): Promise<AppointmentDocument>
  - Validate clinicId, professionalId, patientId with Types.ObjectId.isValid(); throw NotFoundException for any invalid ID
  - Compute: const startAt = new Date(dto.startAt); const endAt = new Date(startAt.getTime() + dto.durationMinutes * 60 * 1000);
  - Call this.checkConflict(dto.professionalId, startAt, endAt)
  - Create and return: this.appointmentModel.create({ ...dto, clinicId: new Types.ObjectId(dto.clinicId), professionalId: new Types.ObjectId(dto.professionalId), patientId: new Types.ObjectId(dto.patientId), startAt, endAt })

async findAll(query: GetAppointmentsQueryDto): Promise<AppointmentDocument[]>
  - Build filter object dynamically from query params that are defined
  - If clinicId provided: filter.clinicId = new Types.ObjectId(clinicId)
  - If professionalId provided: filter.professionalId = new Types.ObjectId(professionalId)
  - If patientId provided: filter.patientId = new Types.ObjectId(patientId)
  - If status provided: filter.status = status
  - If date provided: const day = new Date(date); filter.startAt = { $gte: day, $lt: new Date(day.getTime() + 86400000) }
  - Return this.appointmentModel.find(filter).exec()

async findById(id: string): Promise<AppointmentDocument>
  - if (!Types.ObjectId.isValid(id)) throw new NotFoundException('Invalid appointment ID: ' + id)
  - const appointment = await this.appointmentModel.findById(id).exec()
  - if (!appointment) throw new NotFoundException('Appointment with ID ' + id + ' not found')
  - return appointment

async update(id: string, dto: UpdateAppointmentDto): Promise<AppointmentDocument>
  - Call this.findById(id) to get existing appointment
  - Compute new startAt: const startAt = dto.startAt ? new Date(dto.startAt) : existing.startAt
  - Compute new durationMinutes: const durationMinutes = dto.durationMinutes ?? existing.durationMinutes
  - Compute new endAt: const endAt = new Date(startAt.getTime() + durationMinutes * 60 * 1000)
  - Call this.checkConflict(existing.professionalId.toString(), startAt, endAt, id)
  - Return this.appointmentModel.findByIdAndUpdate(id, { ...dto, startAt, endAt, durationMinutes }, { new: true }).exec()

async updateStatus(id: string, dto: UpdateAppointmentStatusDto): Promise<AppointmentDocument>
  - Call this.findById(id)
  - const allowedTransitions = VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS[existing.status]
  - if (!allowedTransitions.includes(dto.status)) throw new BadRequestException('Cannot transition from ' + existing.status + ' to ' + dto.status)
  - Return this.appointmentModel.findByIdAndUpdate(id, { status: dto.status }, { new: true }).exec()

async cancel(id: string): Promise<{ success: boolean }>
  - Call this.updateStatus(id, { status: AppointmentStatus.CANCELLED })
  - Return { success: true }

private async checkConflict(professionalId: string, startAt: Date, endAt: Date, excludeId?: string): Promise<void>
  - const filter: any = { professionalId: new Types.ObjectId(professionalId), status: { $nin: [AppointmentStatus.CANCELLED] }, startAt: { $lt: endAt }, endAt: { $gt: startAt } }
  - if (excludeId) filter._id = { $ne: new Types.ObjectId(excludeId) }
  - const conflict = await this.appointmentModel.findOne(filter).exec()
  - if (conflict) throw new ConflictException('Professional already has an appointment in this time slot')

Import Injectable, NotFoundException, ConflictException, BadRequestException from '@nestjs/common'. Import InjectModel from '@nestjs/mongoose'. Import Model, Types from 'mongoose'.

prompts.name: appointments-controller
prompts.description: Create AppointmentsController with role-based guards on mutation endpoints
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read apps/api/src/appointments/appointments.controller.ts if it exists and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing method or decorator. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Import from the correct canonical paths — do NOT recreate any of these:
- JwtAuthGuard from '../auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard'
- RolesGuard from '../auth/guards/roles.guard'
- Roles from '../auth/decorators/roles.decorator'
- Role from '../common/enums/role.enum'
- AppointmentsService from './appointments.service'
- CreateAppointmentDto from './dto/create-appointment.dto'
- UpdateAppointmentDto from './dto/update-appointment.dto'
- UpdateAppointmentStatusDto from './dto/update-appointment-status.dto'
- GetAppointmentsQueryDto from './dto/get-appointments-query.dto'
- AppointmentDocument from './schemas/appointment.schema'

Create apps/api/src/appointments/appointments.controller.ts:

@Controller('appointments')
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard)
export class AppointmentsController

Endpoints:
- POST /appointments — @Roles(Role.CLINIC, Role.ATTENDANT) — async create(@Body() dto: CreateAppointmentDto): Promise<AppointmentDocument>
- GET /appointments — no @Roles (all authenticated) — async findAll(@Query() query: GetAppointmentsQueryDto): Promise<AppointmentDocument[]>
- GET /appointments/:id — no @Roles — async findOne(@Param('id') id: string): Promise<AppointmentDocument>
- PUT /appointments/:id — @Roles(Role.CLINIC, Role.ATTENDANT) — async update(@Param('id') id: string, @Body() dto: UpdateAppointmentDto): Promise<AppointmentDocument>
- PATCH /appointments/:id/status — @Roles(Role.CLINIC, Role.ATTENDANT, Role.PROFESSIONAL) — async updateStatus(@Param('id') id: string, @Body() dto: UpdateAppointmentStatusDto): Promise<AppointmentDocument>
- DELETE /appointments/:id — @Roles(Role.CLINIC, Role.ATTENDANT) @HttpCode(204) — async cancel(@Param('id') id: string): Promise<{ success: boolean }>

Controllers contain no business logic — only receive, delegate to AppointmentsService, and return.

prompts.name: appointments-module-and-app
prompts.description: Create AppointmentsModule and register it in AppModule
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing import or module registration. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Create apps/api/src/appointments/appointments.module.ts if it does not already exist:
- @Module({
    imports: [MongooseModule.forFeature([{ name: Appointment.name, schema: AppointmentSchema }])],
    controllers: [AppointmentsController],
    providers: [AppointmentsService],
    exports: [AppointmentsService],
  })
  export class AppointmentsModule
- Import Appointment and AppointmentSchema from './schemas/appointment.schema'
- Import AppointmentsController from './appointments.controller'
- Import AppointmentsService from './appointments.service'

Update apps/api/src/app.module.ts:
- Add import of AppointmentsModule from './appointments/appointments.module'
- Add AppointmentsModule to the imports array
- Do NOT remove or modify any existing imports, modules, or configuration

If appointments.module.ts already exists with correct content, make no changes to it. Only add AppointmentsModule to app.module.ts if it is not already there.

prompts.name: appointments-tests
prompts.description: Unit tests for AppointmentsService covering CRUD, conflict detection and status transitions
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read apps/api/src/appointments/tests/appointments.service.spec.ts if it exists and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing test. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

AppointmentsService is at apps/api/src/appointments/appointments.service.ts — import from there.
AppointmentStatus and VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS are at apps/api/src/appointments/schemas/appointment.schema.ts — import from there.

Create apps/api/src/appointments/tests/appointments.service.spec.ts if it does not already exist:
- Do NOT use real DB connections — mock appointmentModel with jest.fn()
- Mock appointmentModel methods: findById, find, findOne, findByIdAndUpdate, create
- afterEach(() => jest.clearAllMocks())
- Use a valid mockId = new Types.ObjectId().toString() for all IDs

The mock appointment model must be provided as: { provide: getModelToken(Appointment.name), useValue: mockAppointmentModel }

Tests to include:

describe('create'):
- 'should create appointment and compute endAt correctly': valid DTO, checkConflict returns null, appointmentModel.create called with startAt, endAt set correctly
- 'should throw ConflictException when professional has overlapping appointment': findOne (conflict check) returns an existing appointment
- 'should throw NotFoundException for invalid clinicId': clinicId is 'invalid-id'

describe('findAll'):
- 'should return all appointments when no filters provided': find returns array
- 'should filter by clinicId when provided': verify filter object contains clinicId as ObjectId
- 'should filter by date range when date provided': verify filter.startAt uses $gte and $lt

describe('findById'):
- 'should return appointment when found'
- 'should throw NotFoundException when not found': findById returns null
- 'should throw NotFoundException for invalid ObjectId': id = 'not-an-id'

describe('updateStatus'):
- 'should transition from SCHEDULED to CONFIRMED successfully'
- 'should transition from CONFIRMED to CANCELLED successfully'
- 'should throw BadRequestException for invalid transition': COMPLETED to SCHEDULED
- 'should throw BadRequestException for terminal state': CANCELLED to CONFIRMED

describe('cancel'):
- 'should set status to CANCELLED and return success: true'
